race.comment: STROMBOLI DELIGHT (1) got the cash over 1625m at Toowoomba at her most recent appearance on December 13. Rates highly and should take some beating. BLUE EYE DAME (2) was a winner over 1000m at Toowoomba last time, racing on the pace before getting the upper hand and scoring by 1.1 lengths. Montanna Savva who has scored on her two times retains the mount. Expecting a bold showing. UCELLE (7) resumes. Wasn't far away at last run before a break, finishing fourth over 1300m at Sunshine Coast five months ago. Can make her presence felt. MISHANI QUEST (3) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1350m at Ipswich, beaten 13 lengths. Fitter so expect a better run this time.
